stylePrompt: Create a completely original Memphis Style lighting product with rebellious geometry, unexpected proportion, graphic pattern, and bold color contrast. Compose cones, cylinders, spheres, zigzags, and asymmetrical planes like a functional three-dimensional collage. Preserve clear lighting performance, stable construction, and premium finishes so the result feels collectible and design-led rather than chaotic or toy-like.
specificElements: A cone balanced against a striped cylinder
A zigzag arm supporting a spherical diffuser
An asymmetrical totem of primary forms
A patterned base paired with a solid shade
A floating disc intersected by a diagonal rod
